name.en-US: Little Office of S. Ludger, Apostle of the Frisians, Saxons, and Westphalians

description.en-US: A traditional little office in honour of S. Ludger, Apostle of the Frisians, Saxons, and Westphalians, arranged in the canonical hours.

history.en-US: From a book of the same name published in 1712.
